description_long: This is a modern, rectangular microwave oven with a sleek black front panel and a metallic gray body. The front features a large transparent window, allowing a clear view of the interior, which contains a circular glass turntable. The right side of the front panel houses a digital control panel with multiple buttons, a display screen, and a numeric keypad, all clearly labeled for ease of use. The brand name 'WESTERFELD' is prominently displayed above the window in white lettering. The sides and top of the microwave are plain, with subtle vent slots visible along the upper edges. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, black and gray microwave with a large front window, digital control panel, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent window, digital control panel, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain metallic side and the depth of the microwave.
description_view_2: Top view highlighting the flat, featureless top surface and vent slots along the back edge.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the plain metallic side and the depth, mirroring the left side.
attribute_brand_logo: The brand logo 'WESTERFELD' is present, centered above the window on the front panel in white, sans-serif font. It is small but clearly visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by three rows of rectangular buttons, a numeric keypad, and a clock display at the bottom. Each button is clearly labeled, and the layout is organized for intuitive use.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a horizontal bar located at the bottom of the front panel, spanning nearly the full width of the microwave. It is integrated into the design, likely made of metal or plastic, and is flush with the surface for a streamlined appearance.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are located along the upper rear edges of both side panels and the top panel. They are rectangular slots, evenly spaced, and provide necessary ventilation for the appliance.
attribute_window_presence: A large, transparent rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
